name: speakerDiarize
invariants: output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || typeof output.result.dominantSpeaker === 'string'

output.ok === false || output.result.message !== undefined || output.result.speakers.every(function(s){ return typeof s.speaker === 'string' && Number.isFinite(s.wordCount) && Number.isFinite(s.wordShare) && Number.isFinite(s.talkTimeSeconds); })

data.transcript: [Speaker A]: Good morning everyone. [Speaker B]: Ready to ship today.

_note: LENS_ACTION (registerLensAction). Dispatch key 'voice.speakerDiarize'. Deterministic pure text compute; reads artifact.data. Parses [Speaker X]: tags (or explicit segments) into per-speaker turn stats. Non-finite startTime/endTime fall to 0 via parseFloat||0 (talkTimeSeconds never NaN); a non-string transcript is rejected. Result card renders speakerCount/dominantSpeaker/speakers[].{speaker,wordCount,wordShare,talkTimeSeconds} EXACTLY — the page's prior inline panel read speakers[].label/.duration/.share which were never returned (fixed 2026-06-28). Not assassin-driven (LENS_ACTION); authored spec pinned by server/tests/voice-lens-macros.test.js.
